approved_exception_note: Approved metadata-only exception for the handoff alignment artifacts in `THREAD_PACKET.md`, `.codex/kickoff_packets/feat-retrieval-fts.md`, `codex_packet_handoff/tools/planner.py`, and `tests/unit/test_packet_planner.py`: they are separate from the reviewed implementation diff and are not lane-owned retrieval code.
kickoff_budget_note: This thread finished within the low-risk 8-task cap; no sprint-mode 10-task allowance or high-risk 4-task budget was used.
scope_goal: Completed the cumulative 1d6057e9..526fbe490f77ed63284fa8de6ddec8849c7c4944 retrieval thread for the FTS-first retrieval MVP: SQLite FTS is authoritative, the canonical retrieval query constructor is exported through both retrieval facades, RetrievalConstraints are accepted by public helpers, PageIndex and embeddings stay compatibility-only and fail closed, retrieval payload/provenance/hit snapshots normalize deterministically, payload bundle snapshots are canonicalized, source-bundle fallbacks rehydrate provenance/citation/doc/excerpt/downstream payload bundles, direct doc/excerpt/context bundle helpers round-trip through canonical bundle shapes, downstream doc hits carry source attribution, and the follow-up query-normalization and bundle-helper hardening keeps audit keys stable across whitespace variants.
scope_completed: Shipped the cumulative 1d6057e9..526fbe490f77ed63284fa8de6ddec8849c7c4944 retrieval thread, with the reviewed implementation head pinned at 526fbe490f77ed63284fa8de6ddec8849c7c4944: SQLite FTS is the authoritative retrieval path, the canonical retrieval query constructor is exported through both retrieval facades, the public retrieve_* helpers accept RetrievalConstraints objects as well as mapping payloads, retrieval payload, citation, provenance, and hit snapshots normalize list-like and strategy fields deterministically including retrieval_source_strategy and downstream source_strategy attribution, source-bundle fallbacks rehydrate provenance/citation/doc/excerpt/downstream payload bundles, payload bundle snapshots are canonicalized for deterministic downstream rehydration, direct doc/excerpt/context bundle helpers round-trip through canonical bundle shapes, regression coverage exercises the normalized payload snapshots, facade exports, FTS citation/provenance/source-attribution helpers, and the source-bundle-only downstream payload reconstruction path, and constraint payloads stay mapping/dataclass-shaped; iterable doc_types and date_range inputs are normalized deterministically. Stayed fallback-only: PageIndex and embeddings remain compatibility-only shims behind the FTS-first policy and fail closed when deferred. Did not ship: shared or integrator-locked file edits in the reviewed retrieval implementation, provider or routing configuration changes, or retrieval behavior beyond the FTS-first MVP, deterministic snapshot normalization, doc-hit source attribution, source-bundle payload rehydration, and direct bundle helper normalization work in the reviewed range.
tasks_completed: Added FTS provenance retrieval bundles and retrieval service support for deterministic excerpt/provenance output.
Canonicalized excerpt provenance so downstream payloads carry stable hashes and fingerprints.
Kept retrieval FTS-first, normalized retrieval constraints and query inputs through the public facades, and left PageIndex/embeddings fallback-only plumbing that fails closed.
Exported the canonical retrieval query constructor through both retrieval facades and hardened query normalization.
Added source bundle context regression coverage and deterministic rehydration helpers.
Tightened retrieval hit snapshots to carry the canonical retrieval_source_strategy alias, list-like provenance fields, and downstream source_strategy attribution.
Added regression coverage for the normalized payload snapshots, facade exports, and citation/provenance helpers.

Canonicalized payload bundle snapshots for deterministic downstream rehydration, including source-bundle fallbacks, source-bundle-only downstream payload reconstruction, and direct doc/excerpt/context bundle helper normalization.
